summary: Two independent evidence passes found no unresolved delivery finding. The additive review feature satisfies the approved scope, bounded acceptance evidence, secure storage contract, and regression safeguards.

evidence.detail: Approved scope, decisions, exclusions, and Gate D evidence align with the QA report.
Requirements define the same 24 acceptance criteria covered by the implementation and tests.

specification_fidelity.residual_risk: Four chronological document warnings remain visible after security remediation; QA found no behavioral divergence.

evidence.detail: Strict harness recorded 10 of 10 executable criteria passing.
Focused storage, contract, semantic-state, and status coverage is present.
CLI prepare, check, status, JSON, stale, and timestamp behavior is covered.

acceptance_coverage.residual_risk: No acceptance criterion is missing test evidence.

evidence.detail: Schema and semantic validation reject unsafe, incoherent, hidden-carrier, and private-output reports.
Path containment, limits, immutable publication, and post-open revalidation are implemented.
Changed-code audit recorded zero HIGH findings; remaining lexical and duplication notices are advisory.

code_health.residual_risk: Portable filesystem races are mitigated with identity revalidation rather than directory-descriptor APIs.

evidence.detail: The latest strict harness contains green focused checks, full regression, and lint results.
Security audit is valid and reports no open finding.
Security-audit persistence preserves manual pentest findings while refreshing automated ones.

runtime_truth.residual_risk: No runtime smoke applies because this feature changes a Node CLI and local artifacts only.

evidence.detail: QA report records residual filesystem and document-chronology limits with no unresolved blocker.
Implementation ledger has no blocking known gap after independent QA approval.

residual_risk.residual_risk: Residual limits are documented, bounded, and non-blocking; feature closure remains a human decision.
